json.description: A minimal starter flow that plans a small change, executes it, and summarizes the outcome.
json.graph_goal: Inspect the repository, make one targeted improvement, and summarize the result.
json.name: examples/simple-linear.dot
json.title: Simple Linear Workflow

json.description: Read an approved change request from changes/<CR-id>/request.md, keep runtime state under .spark/change-requests/<CR-id>/, implement the required work, evaluate completion against the durable request, and write changes/<CR-id>/result.md when the repository is ready.
json.graph_goal: Implement an approved durable change request in the repository, evaluate whether the requested change is completed in full, record the shipped result, and iterate until the result is ready.
json.name: software-development/implement-change-request.dot
json.title: Implement Change Request

json.description: A greenfield software-development program flow. It creates committed spec packages under specs/<slug>/, stores workflow state under .spark/spec-implementation/<slug>/, refreshes .spark/spec-implementation/current/ as a stable runtime alias to the active workspace, surfaces the committed spec package through current/spec/, extracts a requirement ledger, proposes an architecture, plans milestones, dispatches a milestone worker as a child flow, and audits conformance until the specification is covered or the effort is blocked.
json.graph_goal: Implement a written specification in the repository by turning the spec into requirements, architecture, milestones, and validated milestone deliveries until all in-scope requirements are covered or the effort is blocked.
json.name: software-development/spec-implementation/implement-spec.dot
json.title: Implement Spec Program
